subcodes.title: Words to Juliet Thompson et al, spoken on 1911-08-27
subcodes.first_line: Others are passing from an immortal to a mortal kingdom, but the Bahá'ís are journeying, in the Ark of the Covenant, from a mortal to an immortal world.
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @spiritual transformation, @attaining the life of the spirit, @firmness in the Covenant
